optimizations_applied: LONG-ONLY: Removed all short trades (shorts were -6x worse in original)
ADX FILTER: Only trade when ADX < 30 (avoid trending markets)
HTF CONFIRMATION: Price above 100 EMA with 5% buffer
TIGHTER STOPS: 1.5x ATR instead of 2x ATR
VOLATILITY SIZING: Reduce position size in high volatility regimes
REDUCED RISK: 1.5% risk per trade instead of 2%
FEWER POSITIONS: Max 2 positions instead of 3
notes: Strategy is now profitable with significantly reduced drawdown. Long-only approach with regime filtering dramatically improves risk-adjusted returns.
